capabilities: Ensure batch processing tasks are efficiently integrated into existing software architecture workflows to optimize performance and resource utilization.

procedure.action: Execute batch processing tasks using a job scheduler like Apache Airflow to manage dependencies and timing using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Reconcile artifacts by using a data integration tool such as Apache NiFi to combine data from multiple sources by applying field-level structural comparison on shared key fields; flag conflicts where hash(A.field) != hash(B.field) and log to conflict_log; assert merge_error_count < 1.

Run automated tests on the merged output using a CI/CD pipeline to ensure data integrity and correctness using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke a machine learning model to detect candidates for optimization by analyzing processing logs and metrics by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Assign results using a data classification tool like Apache Atlas to maintain data governance and compliance using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; assert confidence_score >= 0.7 for all classified records.

summary: Integrate batch processing with software architecture by merging workflows and validating outputs to enhance efficiency and consistency.
title: Batch Processing Composition in Software Architecture

failureConditions: Data inconsistency due to improper merging of artifacts.

Increased processing time from inefficient workflow integration; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

Resource exhaustion from unoptimized batch processing tasks; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: Check that merged data passes all integrity tests in the CI/CD pipeline
Ensure batch processing tasks complete within defined SLA times
Monitor resource usage to confirm it remains within acceptable limits
